_comment: Known ctest outcomes on riscv64/openRuyi, consumed by scripts/run-build-check.sh.
Each entry tags a ctest name as 'exclude' or 'flake':
exclude - deterministically wrong for a non-defect reason (version-sensitive
goldens, etc). Dropped via ctest -E. openRuyi's spec %check -E's the
flake   - passes alone, fails under -j contention (timing/resource races, not
code bugs). NOT excluded; the run uses ctest --repeat until-pass so
a retry clears them while a real regression still fails.
Real code bugs are NOT listed here - they are carried as fork-patches (see README).
'test' is matched as a ctest-name regex (anchored ^...$ by the script).

failures.reason: grafana panel goldens drift with the prometheus version; not a defect
alert-rules golden (tests_alerts/test_alerts.yml) drifts with the prometheus version; not a defect
promtool packaged but not baked into the build image yet; `promtool check rules` fails with ENOENT
failures.ref: re-enable once promtool is baked into the build image

failures.reason: BlueFS_wal.wal_v2_check_feature perf-ratio assert (v2 >=1.2x v1), unreliable under CPU contention
TestLibRBD encryption LUKS2/clone: argon2id KDF fails under memory pressure with high -j
